description.ko: 백색광이 크리스탈 프리즘을 통해 선명한 스펙트럼으로 변하는 굴절의 원리를 시각화하여 빛의 숨겨진 층을 매혹적으로 보여줍니다.
description.en: A captivating visualization of light's hidden layers, showcasing the physics of refraction as white light transforms into a vivid spectrum through a crystal prism.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a geometric glass prism resting on a minimalist dark surface. A single, concentrated beam of brilliant white light pierces through the glass, bending and dispersing into a sharp, vibrant rainbow spectrum on the other side. High contrast, focus on caustic light patterns and chromatic aberration, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic textures.
